bio: Informatics undergraduate at Telkom University specialising in deep learning for medical imaging, bioacoustics, and safety-critical real-time systems. Experienced in leading end-to-end research projects from data collection and annotation to model design, evaluation, and peer-reviewed publication. Combines strong Python and PyTorch proficiency with team leadership under the SMART milestone framework.
hardware: RTX 4050 6 GB VRAM · Google Colab Pro+
